start.speaker: Elder Mira
start.text: Ah, a traveller! The spirits must have guided you to us. We are in desperate need of help.

explain_problem.speaker: Elder Mira
explain_problem.text: Goblin raids have grown bolder each night. Our crops are stolen, our guards exhausted. I fear something drives them from the deeper forest.

ask_help.speaker: Elder Mira
ask_help.text: I know it is much to ask of a stranger, but will you help defend our village?

choices.text: Of course. The village will be safe.

accept.speaker: Elder Mira
accept.text: Bless you! Head north of the village into the Greenbough Forest. The goblins camp near the old mill. Return when you've thinned their numbers.

negotiate.speaker: Elder Mira
negotiate.text: We are a poor village, but we can offer gold, supplies, and my gratitude. That, and knowledge of a path further into the wilds that few know of.

choices.text: I need more time to decide.

refuse.speaker: Elder Mira
refuse.text: I understand. If you change your mind, I will be here. Safe travels, stranger.
